### Top 5 cross-vertical picks (action this week)

Direct CalOptima/US Radiology twin pattern. Apply via Enterprise AE posting AND cold-DM CEO Michal Miernowski with founding-leader pitch. Pattern match 5/5.
2. **Garner Health — VP Employer Sales** [K7] — Greenhouse 5575193004, $425-475K target total comp, US Remote with NYC HQ travel. Series C unicorn ($207M raised). Employer-channel = Omada/Ushur pattern Jeff already submitted. **Conflict flag vs J8 dead-URL check; verify in browser before applying.**
3. **AcuityMD — VP Sales, Strategic Accounts** [K8] — Greenhouse 5803113004. $80M Series C 2026-04-21 (StepStone/Benchmark/Redpoint/ICONIQ). Vertical AI for medtech commercialization (16 of top 20 medtech). US Radiology canonical maps 1:1. Boston, remote-friendly.
4. **Aspire — US Country team build** [K9] — Singapore HQ, US launched 2026-04-08, David Harris (ex-Revolut) appointed US Country Head. Career portal at people-jobs.com/aspire/ + LinkedIn-DM Harris within 48h. Series C Asia-EU-US fintech challenging Ramp + Mercury.
5. **Volpara Health — Sales Director, United States** [K12] — volparahealth.com/careers/current-opportunities. Lunit-affiliated NZ radiology AI (breast cancer screening). ACR Learning Network designation Oct 2025 = institutional procurement window open. Direct US Radiology canonical mirror.
